goal: Continue DEV-017 in the existing DEV-017 worktree after the first writer produced no diff. Implement the responsive UI/UX and page-state acceptance work with a narrow frontend/documentation scope, then run gates.
acceptance: Continuation is executed through the codex_executor connector in the existing DEV-017 isolated worktree, not by manual chat edits.
Work is limited to frontend UI/CSS, focused UI state tests if practical, DEV-017/AUDIT-017 docs, and runtime memory.
Dashboard, Workbench, Projects, Tasks, Chat, Knowledge, Contracts, Approvals, System Settings, and Login remain usable at 1440/1280/960 desktop widths.
Long Russian-like text, badges, cards, toolbar controls, side navigation, evidence panels, and dense lists wrap or truncate predictably without overlap.
State surfaces for normal, empty, loading, no-permission, error, AI-generating, AI-failed, expired/archived are visually consistent where applicable.
No new top-level menu is added and no existing business permission rule is weakened.
Run and pass git diff --check, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test, npm run build, npm run smoke:api, and npm audit --audit-level=low.
If any gate fails, classify the failure and repair according to Loop policy.

codex_command: You are the Loop continuation writer for xtgzpt DEV-017. Work only in the current working tree. Do not restart the feature or expand business scope. First inspect apps/web/src/ui/App.tsx and apps/web/src/styles.css, plus docs/dev-readiness/07_PAGE_STATES_AND_RESPONSIVE.md and docs/dev-log/DEV-016.md. Implement a narrow production UI/UX responsive pass: improve 1440/1280/960 layout constraints, Russian-length text wrapping/truncation, stable toolbar/card/list dimensions, and consistent state surfaces for normal/empty/loading/no-permission/error/AI-generating/AI-failed/expired/archived. Core pages: Dashboard, Workbench, Projects, Tasks, Chat, Knowledge, Contracts, Approvals, System Settings, Login. Prefer CSS and existing component refinements; avoid backend changes unless a focused state contract test requires a tiny shared type update. Do not add a new top-level menu. Keep AI Frameworks/AI Runs inside existing System Settings/source-object surfaces. Keep AI unable to approve, reject, return, transfer, add-sign, publish knowledge, create official tasks, sign, pay, or confirm execution. Write docs/dev-log/DEV-017.md, docs/dev-log/AUDIT-017.md, and runtime memory. Run git diff --check at minimum and document intended gates. Do not implement finance, procurement, inventory, ERP, external agents, external vector DB, external notifications, mobile app, deployment, secrets, or production writes.
